projectInfo.summary: Platform modernization is on track. Core API migration completed ahead of schedule. Auth service rollout in progress with 70% tenant coverage. Legacy decommission shifted to Q2 due to compliance review dependency.

workItems.title: API Gateway v2 — production rollout
workItems.description: Full production deployment of the new API gateway with traffic migration.

workItems.title: OAuth 2.1 token service upgrade
workItems.description: Upgraded token issuance service to OAuth 2.1 spec compliance.

workItems.title: Rate limiting & throttling policies
workItems.description: Implemented adaptive rate limiting for all public API endpoints.

workItems.title: Tenant migration — batch 3 of 4
workItems.description: Migrating enterprise tenants to new auth service infrastructure.

workItems.title: Real-time event streaming pipeline
workItems.description: Building the new event-driven data pipeline for real-time analytics.

workItems.title: Schema validation framework
workItems.description: Implementing contract-first schema validation across all services.

workItems.title: Tenant migration — batch 4 of 4
workItems.description: Final batch of tenant migrations to complete auth service cutover.

workItems.title: Load testing at 2x peak capacity
workItems.description: Performance validation under sustained 2x peak load conditions.

workItems.title: Legacy monitoring decommission
workItems.description: Decommission legacy monitoring stack after new observability platform confirmed.

workItems.title: Compliance audit — data residency
workItems.description: Regulatory review of data residency requirements blocking legacy shutdown.

workItems.title: Legacy API sunset communication
workItems.description: Customer and partner notification plan for legacy API deprecation.
